headline: Hims & Hers Surprise Rescue: Stock Explodes 40% on GLP-1 Truce
summary: In a dramatic reversal of fortune, Hims & Hers Health (NYSE:HIMS) has been rescued by the very company that nearly sank it. Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO), which sued the telehealth provider just last month over copycat compounded GLP-1 drugs, has now agreed to partner with Hims to sell its branded obesity medications — including Wegovy and ... Hims & Hers Surprise Rescue: Stock Explodes 40% on GLP-1 Truce

headline: Eli Lilly & Co (NYSE:LLY) Emerges as a Prime GARP Investment Candidate
summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) exemplifies GARP investing, offering strong growth at a price supported by its industry leadership and profitability.

headline: Eli Lilly Weighs Employer Growth Potential Against Fresh Actos Legal Risk
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) launched its Employer Connect platform to expand access to its obesity medicine Zepbound through U.S. employers and program administrators. A federal court certified a National Third-Party Payor class action lawsuit related to the diabetes drug Actos, naming Eli Lilly and Takeda as defendants. Eli Lilly, a major U.S. pharmaceutical company, is leaning into employer-based coverage with Employer Connect as obesity treatments receive more attention in health benefit...
